questions: How do you run a quick market validation test?
qa.answer: A smoke‑test campaign is a low‑cost, time‑boxed test to validate demand or messaging before full investment. It focuses on clear offers, simple landing pages, and tight measurement.
implication: Define hypothesis, success threshold, and time box upfront.
Use minimal viable creative and landing page; optimize speed.
Decide go/no‑go based on pre‑set metrics (CTR, CVR, CPL/CAC).
